approach: The challenge requires initiating a session via a POST request to /api/marble/session and then confirming it via a PUT request to /api/marble/confirm using the runId and handoffKey returned by the session creation. The evidence shows a consistent pattern of these two steps resulting in an accepted response.
evidenceUsed: PUT /api/marble/confirm accepts runId and handoffKey to complete the challenge
The required header x-gym-benchmark-run is used in all requests
uncertainties: None, the API pattern is consistent across all observed sessions.
